nl_query: List all faculty members who prepared the answer key for the Algorithms exam and whether they are also in the evaluator pool for that course.
failed_sql:
SELECT fc.name AS faculty_name, ep.is_available AS is_in_evaluator_pool
FROM   evaluator_pool ep
JOIN   board b ON b.id           = ep.board_id
JOIN   answer_key          ak  ON ak.qp_id       = b.qp_id AND ak.status = 'APPROVED'
JOIN   answer_key_preparer akp ON akp.answer_key_id = ak.id
JOIN   faculty_cache       fc  ON fc.id          = akp.faculty_cache_id
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id          = b.course_id
WHERE  ak.title ILIKE '%Algorithms%' AND ep.is_available = TRUE
ORDER  BY fc.name;
error:
Validation failed (cost): EXPLAIN revealed a SQL error: missing FROM-clause entry for table "ak"
LINE 5: JOIN   answer_key_preparer akp ON akp.answer_key_id = ak.id
                                                              ^
